creator: adox@mcx2.org
text:
I ask the developer of ncmpcpp he said me it's a problem by gcc ,it's to old ,hence
add USE_GCC=.

--- ncmpcpp-patch.diff begins here ---
diff -ruN ncmpcpp.orig/Makefile ncmpcpp/Makefile
--- ncmpcpp.orig/Makefile	2008-09-07 08:15:40.000000000 +0200
+++ ncmpcpp/Makefile	2008-09-07 17:58:55.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	ncmpcpp
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.2
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	http://unkart.ovh.org/ncmpcpp/ \
 				http://mirror.mcx2.org/
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@
 USE_BZIP2=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_ICONV=	yes
+USE_GCC=	4.2+
 USE_GNOME=	glib20
 CONFIGURE_ENV=	CFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
				LDFLAGS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
diff -ruN ncmpcpp.orig/distinfo ncmpcpp/distinfo
--- ncmpcpp.orig/distinfo	2008-09-07 08:15:40.000000000 +0200
+++ ncmpcpp/distinfo	2008-09-07 06:40:33.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (ncmpcpp-0.2.1.tar.bz2) = 14d4022f9c9cd98cc4871e6335cdf26c
-SHA256 (ncmpcpp-0.2.1.tar.bz2) = 08718dd17341fbc6d9752738bcf631721686ed8c7e43a307eeb468c688f09fd9
-SIZE (ncmpcpp-0.2.1.tar.bz2) = 286624
+MD5 (ncmpcpp-0.2.2.tar.bz2) = 617e0dba49598ef73cab80653a58e6fa
+SHA256 (ncmpcpp-0.2.2.tar.bz2) = 4e6125d8b3efdf0669e81a22be5104f39286e85986feeaf8e374de3840270e4a
+SIZE (ncmpcpp-0.2.2.tar.bz2) = 290557
diff -ruN ncmpcpp.orig/files/patch-src-lyrics.cpp ncmpcpp/files/patch-src-lyrics.cpp
--- ncmpcpp.orig/files/patch-src-lyrics.cpp	1970-01-01 01:00:00.000000000 +0100
+++ ncmpcpp/files/patch-src-lyrics.cpp	2008-09-07 10:49:38.000000000 +0200
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- src/lyrics.cpp.orig	2008-09-07 10:41:28.000000000 +0200
++++ src/lyrics.cpp	2008-09-07 10:41:51.000000000 +0200
+@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@
+  ***************************************************************************/
+
+ #include "lyrics.h"
+-#include <fcntl.h>
++#include <sys/stat.h>
+
+ const string lyrics_folder = home_folder + "/" + ".lyrics";
+
diff -ruN ncmpcpp.orig/pkg-message ncmpcpp/pkg-message
--- ncmpcpp.orig/pkg-message	2008-09-07 08:15:40.000000000 +0200
+++ ncmpcpp/pkg-message	2008-09-07 10:52:08.000000000 +0200
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
+ 
+ const string lyrics_folder = home_folder + "/" + ".lyrics";
+ 
diff -ruN ncmpcpp.orig/pkg-message ncmpcpp/pkg-message
--- ncmpcpp.orig/pkg-message	2008-09-07 08:15:40.000000000 +0200
+++ ncmpcpp/pkg-message	2008-09-07 10:52:08.000000000 +0200
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 ncmpcpp has been installed.

 A default ncmpcpprc config has been installed to:
-PREFIX/share/doc/ncmpcpprc.sample
+PREFIX/share/doc/ncmpcpp/ncmpcpprc

 For more information about ncmpcpp visit:
 http://unkart.ovh.org/ncmpcpp
--- ncmpcpp-patch.diff ends here ---
